exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your natural disaster recovery forward
items: Document and photograph all disaster damage to your property for insurance claims
Contact your insurance company within 24-48 hours to file an official disaster claim
Create a comprehensive inventory of all damaged personal belongings with descriptions and estimated values
Research and gather all important documents and records needed for recovery assistance applications
Register with FEMA for federal disaster assistance within 60 days of the disaster declaration
Establish secure temporary housing arrangements and document all related expenses
